message: You know those days when everything seems to go sideways? A few weeks ago, I was rushing to get the kids out the door for school when I realized I hadn't checked our go-bags in ages. My mind raced—what if we needed them? Instead of panicking, I took a few minutes to grab some fresh snacks and double-check our important documents. It felt like a small win, but honestly, it made me feel so much better knowing we were a little more prepared. It’s funny how those little moments can bring peace of mind, isn’t it? Have you had any small wins in your preparedness journey lately? Oh, and this little refresher helped too!
